content: INTENT: The user has explicitly asked Sage to lead. They are not presenting a new symptom — they are handing over the decision to Sage. Emotional intensity: {intensity}/10. {intensity_guidance} Provide concrete, warm, practical suggestions directly. Do not ask another exploratory question. If Sage asked a question in the prior turn and the user said they do not know, answer your own question with two or three specific ideas. Lead gently but clearly.
_review_required: Rule 1 approval (new intent class — control-layer change in intent_route.py required)
Clinical review (therapeutic posture: direct recommendation vs. guided exploration)
_option_b_routing_change: intent_route.py INTENT_SYSTEM requires a new 'advice_request' rule: fires when user says they do not know AND asks Sage to suggest/recommend, or when user returns the floor after Sage asked an unanswerable question. Primary intent. Secondary can be emotional_support for blended turns (§6.4). Classification note: this is NOT new_skill (no symptom presented) and NOT general_chat (user has explicitly delegated). Examples: 'I don't know, can you suggest something?', 'just tell me what to do', 'you pick', 'any ideas?'
_option_b_test_coverage: test_intent_route_node.py: explicit delegation phrases classify as advice_request, not general_chat
test_nodes.py: bare emotional words still classify as general_chat (guard must not regress)
test_freeflow_respond.py: advice_request intent produces concrete suggestions, no exploratory question
